title: The First City [Modpack]
description: The modpack for playing The First City ($50,000 MrBeast Mod).
body:
This modpack is all about The First City ($50,000 MrBeast Mod). You can download this modpack and have all the important mods to play The First City. 
Client settings:

Use Fancy graphics (not Fabulous)
32 render distance
32 simulation distance
Disable view bobbing

[To the offical Mod!](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-first-city)
